mapper.insert: INSERT INTO savings_calc ( calc_id, member_id, product_name, monthly_amount, period_months, annual_rate, calc_method, tax_type, tax_rate, income_tax_rate, local_tax_rate, principal, interest_before, pre_tax_amount, income_tax, local_tax, tax_total, final_amount, saved_at ) VALUES ( savings_calc_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{productName}, #{monthlyAmount}, #{periodMonths}, #{annualRate}, #{calcMethod}, #{taxType}, #{taxRate}, #{incomeTaxRate}, #{localTaxRate}, #{principal}, #{interestBefore}, #{preTaxAmount}, #{incomeTax}, #{localTax}, #{taxTotal}, #{finalAmount}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT calc_id calcId, member_id memberId, product_name productName, monthly_amount monthlyAmount, period_months periodMonths, annual_rate annualRate, calc_method calcMethod, tax_type taxType, tax_rate taxRate, income_tax_rate incomeTaxRate, local_tax_rate localTaxRate, principal, interest_before interestBefore, pre_tax_amount preTaxAmount, income_tax incomeTax, local_tax localTax, tax_total taxTotal, final_amount finalAmount, TO_CHAR(saved_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') savedAt FROM savings_calc WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY saved_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT calc_id calcId, member_id memberId, product_name productName, monthly_amount monthlyAmount, period_months periodMonths, annual_rate annualRate, calc_method calcMethod, tax_type taxType, tax_rate taxRate, income_tax_rate incomeTaxRate, local_tax_rate localTaxRate, principal, interest_before interestBefore, pre_tax_amount preTaxAmount, income_tax incomeTax, local_tax localTax, tax_total taxTotal, final_amount finalAmount, TO_CHAR(saved_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') savedAt FROM savings_calc WHERE calc_id = #{calcId}
